string.text: Clear out the local mutants' lair.

%c[ui_8]The beasts in the area have multiplied, howling all day long, driving me crazy! My head will soon turn square from their cries! Anyways, if you kill off those creatures, I won't begrudge you the reward. At the same time, you'll collect some trophies, and maybe I'll find something I like among them.\n\n%c[ui_orange][This task will fail if after taking it, the player goes to a location where this task is not available]
Already completed the safari? Great, collect your reward.
There's an order for a small batch of regular mutant parts. It's a piece of cake. Interested?
%c[ui_8]There is an order for a small batch of standard mutant parts, namely... %c[ui_orange]%s%c[ui_8]. Once you've gathered everything you need, bring it here.
An order has come in for a rare mutant part. The reward is relative to its rarity. What do you say?
%c[ui_8]An order has come in for a rare mutant part, namely... %c[ui_orange]%s%c[ui_8]. It will take a little effort, but I think you can do it. If you find it, I'll be waiting.
I was already thinking about canceling the order. Here's your money.
Kalyvan asked for a %s to be brought to him. The weapon must be in working order, at the very least.

There's an order for a small batch of working firearms. It doesn't matter who needs them or why. The main thing is that the guns need to be in working order if you want any reward at all, but I don't care about the rest. Are you in?

%c[ui_8]There is an order for a small batch of working firearms. It doesn't matter who needs them or why. Right now, I need %c[ui_orange]%s%c[ui_8] in working condition if you want any reward at all, but I don't care about the rest. If you find any, bring them to me.
Here, this is what you need. Keep your share.
